name: string
title: Extended String Functions
description: Additional string functions not available in the built-in set: padLeft, padRight, mask, truncate, isBlank, isNumeric, camelCase, snakeCase

functions.name: padLeft
functions.description: Pads str on the left with padChar until the string reaches the target size. Only the first character of padChar is used. string.padLeft("7", 3, "0") => "007"

functions.name: padRight
functions.description: Pads str on the right with padChar until the string reaches the target size. Only the first character of padChar is used. string.padRight("hi", 5, "-") => "hi---"

functions.name: mask
functions.description: Replaces the middle portion of str with '*', preserving keepFirst characters at the start and keepLast characters at the end. string.mask("4111-1111-1111-1234", 0, 4) => "***************1234"

functions.name: truncate
functions.description: Truncates str to maxLen characters. If truncated, appends '...' (total length = maxLen).

functions.name: isBlank
functions.description: Returns true if str is nil, empty, or contains only whitespace.

functions.name: isNumeric
functions.description: Returns true if str represents a valid decimal integer or float value.

functions.name: camelCase
functions.description: Converts str to lowerCamelCase, splitting on spaces, hyphens, underscores, and case transitions.
